title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: Custom EQ slider touch indicator (white circle) does not appear, follow, or disappear correctly on all 7 sliders in the Custom EQ screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. On the Custom EQ screen, locate any one of the 7 frequency sliders.
5. Touch and hold the slider dot on that frequency slider.
6. While holding, slide the dot left or right along the slider.
8. Repeat steps 4–7 for each of the remaining 6 frequency sliders.
expected: A white circle appears around the slider dot when the user touches and holds it. The white circle follows the dot as the user slides left/right. The white circle disappears when the user releases the dot. This behavior is consistent across all 7 sliders in the Custom EQ screen.
